name: ethernet-packet-lab
description: Two-node Ethernet packet generator and receiver lab with a Node.js control UI and Linux raw-socket agent.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && python3 -m py_compile tools/packet_agent.py && npm run check:examples
scripts.check:examples: for f in examples/*.json; do python3 tools/packet_agent.py build < "$f" >/dev/null || exit 1; done
